action.reasoning: Observation: the ViT pilot failed immediately because train.py still restricts --backbone choices to resnet50,dinov2, even though model.py already implements vit_b16_augreg. Analysis: this is a simple CLI/plumbing mismatch, not a modeling issue. We still have enough time for one short pilot, and the highest-value next step is to enable the backbone end-to-end, run a 2-epoch pilot, and measure local val before deciding on eval. Decision: patch train.py argument choices and backbone-specific defaults if needed, then run a 2-epoch ViT-B/16 AugReg pilot plus local flip-TTA validation.
action.command: python train.py --backbone vit_b16_augreg --epochs 2 --output_dir checkpoints/vit_pilot && python validate.py --checkpoint checkpoints/vit_pilot/best.pt --tta_mode flip

command_output.stderr:
Unexpected keys (norm.bias, norm.weight) found while loading pretrained weights. This may be expected if model is being adapted.
